strategies.name: Preserve
strategies.who_for: Allocators prioritising capital preservation over yield optimisation.
strategies.description: Tier 1 protocols only. No looping, no leverage. Higher cash buffer. Stricter protocol eligibility.
strategies.target_apy_note: Target profile. Not paper tracked. Variable APY, not guaranteed.

strategies.name: Core
strategies.tagline: Systematic yield with verified paper track record
strategies.who_for: Family offices allocating $25K–$250K seeking systematic, transparent DeFi yield.
strategies.description: Tier 1 + selected Tier 2 protocols. Deterministic risk-gated rebalancing. Public paper track record since June 2026.
strategies.target_apy_note: Paper APY verified since June 10, 2026. Variable APY, not guaranteed.

strategies.name: Max Yield
strategies.tagline: Advanced mechanics for higher yield tolerance
strategies.who_for: Experienced allocators accepting higher volatility for yield upside.
strategies.description: Looping, leveraged lending, advanced vault mechanics. Tighter monitoring, stricter liquidation logic.
strategies.target_apy_note: Target profile. Not paper tracked. Variable APY, not guaranteed. Possible loss of capital.

global.apy_disclaimer: APY figures are variable and not guaranteed. Past paper performance does not guarantee future results. Possible loss of capital.
